MUSC669 Orchestral Excerpts for String Players (1 Credit) In-depth study of the orchestral excerpts required for professional orchestra auditions. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 6 credits. Credit Only Granted for: MUSC669, MUSC699B, MUSC699L, MUSC699Q, or MUSC699X. Formerly: MUSC699B,MUSC699L,MUSC699Q,and MUSC699X.

813

814

MUSC - School of Music

MUSC670 Interpreting Tonal Music: Analytical Tools, Techniques, and Perspectives (3 Credits) Analytical tools, techniques, and perspectives for interpreting tonal music. Musical materials for analysis will predominantly be European music from about 1775 through 1900, supplemented with other tonal music genres, primarily those from the African American tradition. Prerequisite: MUSC451 or equivalent; or permission of ARHU-School of Music.

MUSC676 Historical Theory and Method in Ethnomusicology (3 Credits) Reading and discussion of major works in ethnomusicology, with emphasis on schools of thought, convergence with and divergence from musicology and systematic musicology; close examination of trends in methodology and theory from the mid-eighteenth century until approximately thirty years before the present. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Credit Only Granted for: MUET675 or MUSC676. Formerly: MUET675.
